action.reasoning: Observation: mae_60min plateaued at ~3.45-3.46 across multiple runs. Bigger model didn't help. Training loss still decreasing while val plateaus ~30 epochs. Analysis: Single model has hit its capacity ceiling. Best path forward: ensemble. I have a saved best checkpoint already. Let me train 2-3 more models with different seeds/hyperparams, then average their predictions. Each training run is ~22min. With 1.6h, I can do ~3 more runs but that's tight. Better strategy: train ONE more model with slightly different config (different seed, maybe early stopping based on val60), save both checkpoints, and ensemble in predict.py. Decision: Train one additional model with different seed to ensemble. Save current best.pt as best_a.pt first.
